body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-10517", "cvss": {"score": 5.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "A flaw was found in Clair. The fetcher component makes outbound HTTP requests to attacker-supplied URIs from manifest layer descriptors without IP or scheme filtering. When PSK authentication is not configured (opt-in, not enforced by default), an unauthenticated attacker can submit a manifest with a URI pointing to internal services or cloud metadata endpoints. The SSRF is reflective for non-200 responses, leaking up to 256 bytes of error body content via CheckResponse error messages. Operator-managed Red Hat Quay deployments auto-configure PSK and are not exposed to the unauthenticated attack vector.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00292, "percentile": 0.20888}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-698x-9w2p-7vvp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-07T23:47:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-698x-9w2p-7vvp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-698x-9w2p-7vvp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-10517"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-01T09:16:16Z", "published_at": "2026-06-01T09:31:12Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-10517", "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-10517", "https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2486779", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-698x-9w2p-7vvp"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/quay/claircore", "summary": "Claircore: Unauthenticated attackers can submit manifests with URIs pointing to internal services or cloud metadata endpoints", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-07T23:47:01Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-698x-9w2p-7vvp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/quay/claircore"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.5.52"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
